description:
Alienware systems lights, fans, and power control tools and apps

AWCC alternative in 500kb. You can control your system lights (including hardware and software effects such as system parameters monitoring, ambient lights, sound haptic), fans, temperatures, power settings, and a lot more.
Important! If you are using tools for the first time, please read Beginner's guide and AlienFX-GUI readme to configure out its concept and operation principle.
Fan-SDK_V1.zip have binaries built against older fan control version, use it only in case you know what you're doing (or have Aurora R7), check readme file inside archive first to configure out how to make it working!
Changes into this release:
All GUI tools:
- Size and performance optimisation - now all GUI tools smaller, but start-up time decreased.
- Bug fixed: Incorrect version reported to the update check, providing update notification even for latest version.
AlienFX-GUI, AlienFan-GUI:
- New: Beta support for AWCC 6 stop/start (using "Disable AWCC" in settings) added. Before, only AWCC 5 can be disabled this way. It's not final, some services still can work after disable, but should not interfere with tools.
- New: Tray icon tooltip reworked. Now it presents CPU/GPU sensor temperatures for the fan connected to CPU/GPU into any power mode. For Manual mode, temperature sensor value which is switch last fan activity shown instead.
AlienFX-GUI:
- Zone spatial map generation procedure reworked. This should prevent incorrect zone map generation, leading to random crashes, and also provide increased performance for zone re-calculation.
